instagram.header: 🔗 Link in bio → start your journey
instagram.caption: Beware the depths of the Thalassa realm. 🌊 Meet the Abyssal Jelly Horror, a master of stealth ready to paralyze your opponents before they even see it coming. With its Bioluminescent Sting, this scout is the perfect addition to your deck if you want to keep the board frozen and your enemies guessing. 💡 How would you use its Freeze ability to turn the tide? ✨
instagram.alt_text: A dark underwater fantasy creature resembling a bioluminescent jellyfish with glowing tentacles, lurking in the shadows of the Thalassa ocean.

facebook.body: In the deepest trenches of the Thalassa realm, light is not a sign of warmth, but a harbinger of doom. The Abyssal Jelly Horror serves as a silent scout for the aquatic forces, drifting through the Aether Bleed undetected. Its unique biology allows it to strike from the shadows, utilizing its Bioluminescent Sting to render its prey completely immobile. In combat, its Stealth capability ensures it reaches the front lines unharmed, while its ability to Freeze a target unit upon attacking provides critical tempo control. Whether you are locking down a powerful champion or setting up a lethal combo, this card is essential for any tactician playing the Thalassa faction. What units are you pairing this scout with to dominate the board?
facebook.link_cta: Explore the full card gallery and join the battle at the official site:

discord.content:
**Unit Spotlight: Abyssal Jelly Horror**

Direct from the depths of the Thalassa realm, our newest reveal is a nightmare for your opponent's tempo. Stealthy and surgical, the Jelly Horror is here to keep the board on ice.

- **Name:** Abyssal Jelly Horror
- **Cost:** 2 Mana
- **Stats:** 2/1
- **Keywords:** Stealth
- **Ability:** Bioluminescent Sting — When this unit attacks, Freeze the target unit.

Ready to command the waters? [Join the fight and play VOIDBORN here](https://voidborn.fun)
